title: Sell Your House Fast for Cash | Heberer Homes
meta_description: Heberer Homes buys houses in any condition for cash. No repairs, no agents, no fees. Get a fair cash offer in 24 hours and close in as little as 7 days.

hero.headline: Sell Your House Fast — For Cash. No Repairs. No Hassle.
hero.subheadline: Heberer Homes buys houses in any condition. Get a fair, no-obligation cash offer within 24 hours and close on your timeline — as fast as 7 days. No agents, no commissions, no hidden fees.

features.title: How It Works
features.subtitle: Selling your house shouldn't take months or cost thousands in repairs and agent fees. With Heberer Homes, it takes 3 simple steps.

items.title: Tell Us About Your Property
items.description: Fill out our simple form or give us a call. Tell us about your house — any condition, any situation. We buy homes others won't.

items.title: Get Your Fair Cash Offer
items.description: We'll evaluate your property and present a no-obligation cash offer within 24 hours. No lowball tactics — just a fair, honest price.

items.title: Close On Your Timeline
items.description: Pick your closing date — as soon as 7 days or whenever works for you. We handle all the paperwork and pay all closing costs. Walk away with cash in hand.

items.quote: I inherited a house that needed $40K in repairs. Heberer Homes gave me a fair offer and closed in 10 days. No contractors, no stress, no surprises. I couldn't believe how easy it was.
items.name: Sarah M.
items.title: Inherited Property

items.quote: After my divorce, I needed to sell fast and move on. They made me an offer the same day I called and worked around my schedule. The whole process was respectful and professional.
items.name: James T.
items.title: Divorce Sale

items.quote: We were facing foreclosure and running out of time. Heberer Homes stepped in, made a fair cash offer, and closed in just 8 days. They literally saved our credit and gave us a fresh start.
items.name: Linda & Robert K.
items.title: Foreclosure Prevention

cta.headline: Ready to Sell Your House the Easy Way?
cta.subheadline: No repairs. No agents. No fees. Just a fair cash offer and a closing date that works for you. Get started in under 60 seconds.
cta.text: Get My Free Cash Offer Now
